environment.env_indoor_home: interior of a modern home, natural lived-in environment
environment.env_indoor_patio: covered patio environment, some plants, patio walls

environment.env_outdoor_rooftop: rooftop terrace, city skyline in background
environment.env_outdoor_park: outdoor park, trees and grass, open sky
environment.env_outdoor_grass_beach: beach environment, green natural grass and ocean, no sand
environment.env_outdoor_cornish: beach environment, paved and ocean, no sand
environment.env_outdoor_forest: sparse forest environment, some trees, patchy grass of varying length
environment.env_outdoor_desert: arid desert landscape, dry earth, open sky
environment.env_outdoor_mountain: mountain landscape, rocky terrain, expansive vista

time_of_day.time_blue_hour: blue hour, soft twilight, cool ambient light, dusk
time_of_day.time_midday: midday, harsh overhead sunlight, strong shadows
time_of_day.time_sunset: sunset, deep orange and red sky, dramatic light
time_of_day.time_sunrise: sunrise, pale pink and gold light, fresh morning atmosphere

weather.wx_overcast: overcast, thick cloud cover, flat diffused light
weather.wx_light_rain: light rain, wet surfaces, reflections on ground
weather.wx_heavy_rain: heavy rain, rain streaks visible, drenched environment
weather.wx_fog: foggy atmosphere, low visibility, soft edges
weather.wx_snow: snow falling, white ground, cold atmosphere
weather.wx_windy: windy conditions, hair and fabric movement implied
weather.wx_dry_heat: dry heat, sharp light, arid feel

location_type.loc_industrial: industrial space, raw concrete, metal and pipes
location_type.loc_natural_landscape: natural outdoor landscape, no man-made structures
location_type.loc_pool_area: pool area, wet surfaces, lounge setting
location_type.loc_type_south_asian: south asian pakistani or indian style

background.bg_blurred_bokeh: heavily blurred background, strong bokeh, subject isolation
background.bg_slightly_blurred: slightly blurred background, shallow depth of field
background.bg_in_focus: background fully in focus, environmental context preserved
background.bg_gradient_paper: gradient paper backdrop, smooth tone transition
background.bg_urban_bokeh: blurred city lights, urban bokeh, evening or night

surface.surf_wet_surface: wet reflective surface, puddles or rain-soaked
surface.surf_water: in or on water, pool, ocean or lake surface
surface.surf_metal_grating: industrial metal grate or mesh surface

props.prop_wall_railing: wall or railing as support element
props.prop_window: window as scene element, light source or frame
props.prop_vehicle: vehicle present in scene, car or motorcycle

depth.depth_shallow: shallow environment, subject close to background, compressed space
depth.depth_moderate: moderate environmental depth, some background recession
depth.depth_deep: deep expansive environment, strong sense of space behind subject
depth.depth_infinite: vast open space, horizon or open sky, no background boundary

photography_style.style_editorial: editorial fashion photography, polished and deliberate
photography_style.style_fine_art: fine art photography, artistic and conceptual
photography_style.style_street: street photography aesthetic, raw and unposed
photography_style.style_lifestyle: lifestyle photography, natural activity and environment
photography_style.style_high_fashion: high fashion editorial, dramatic and stylized
photography_style.style_artistic_nude: fine art nude photography, tasteful and composed
photography_style.style_accidental_capture: unplanned snapshot aesthetic, slightly imperfect composition that feels authentic, natural skin sheen, realistic room-light color balance
photography_style.style_social_media_candid: raw 'story' style aesthetic, high-fidelity but unedited, direct and honest representation of the subject in an everyday setting, no post-processing
photography_style.style_domestic_verite: observational 'slice of life' style, captures the subject in a way that feels like a shared living space, zero-glamour, focused on the raw honesty of the moment

film_type.film_medium_format: medium format film, rich detail, smooth grain
film_type.film_polaroid: polaroid aesthetic, faded edges, warm cast
film_type.film_lomography: lomography style, vignette, color shifts, grain
film_type.film_kodak_portra: Kodak Portra emulation, warm skin tones, fine grain
film_type.film_fuji_velvia: Fuji Velvia emulation, saturated colors, punchy contrast
film_type.film_ilford_bw: Ilford black and white emulation, classic monochrome
film_type.film_modern_cmos: standard modern CMOS sensor output, balanced dynamic range, realistic digital color science
film_type.film_high_bitrate_digital: high-fidelity digital capture, no compression artifacts, clean and data-rich image
film_type.film_raw_sensor_data: unprocessed raw sensor output, no internal camera sharpening, natural digital texture

era.era_90s: 1990s aesthetic, film grain, warm muted tones
era.era_70s: 1970s aesthetic, warm earthy tones, soft vignette
era.era_50s: 1950s aesthetic, classic clean tones, soft contrast
era.era_modern_day: captured in the current year, modern digital clarity, contemporary color standards
era.era_ultra_modern: current-gen digital aesthetics, high-speed sensor capture, modern optics

aesthetic.aes_minimal: minimal aesthetic, clean negative space, restrained
aesthetic.aes_moody: moody aesthetic, dark tones, emotional weight
aesthetic.aes_bright_airy: bright and airy, high key, light and fresh
aesthetic.aes_dark_dramatic: dark and dramatic, low key, heavy shadows
aesthetic.aes_warm_romantic: warm and romantic, soft golden tones
aesthetic.aes_vintage: vintage aesthetic, aged tones, nostalgic feel
aesthetic.aes_raw_gritty: raw and gritty, unpolished, high contrast
aesthetic.aes_unprocessed_raw: straight out of the camera, no color grading, no post-processing filters, honest and direct
aesthetic.aes_natural_balance: neutral color balance, realistic saturation levels, no artificial HDR look
aesthetic.aes_ambient_honesty: lit only by available light, no studio fill, realistic shadow depth and highlight retention
aesthetic.aes_zero_beautification: no digital smoothing, authentic skin details, raw and unpolished visual truth

realism.realism_slightly_stylized: slightly stylized, mostly realistic with subtle enhancement
realism.realism_unsharpened_digital: sharp without digital halos, natural lens-based clarity, no artificial edge enhancement
realism.realism_sensor_authentic: authentic sensor noise in shadows, realistic highlights, no aggressive noise reduction
realism.realism_optical_precision: sharp focus achieved through lens optics, realistic depth, no digital depth-of-field manipulation
realism.realism_raw_capture: completely unedited, natural white balance, realistic contrast without HDR flattening

transformation.transform_ghibli: Studio Ghibli anime style, hand-painted watercolor backgrounds, soft character linework, whimsical atmosphere
transformation.transform_pencil_sketch: graphite pencil drawing, visible cross-hatching and shading, paper texture, hand-drawn style
transformation.transform_ink_line_art: clean black ink linework, high contrast, minimal shading, emphasis on silhouette and contour
transformation.transform_oil_painting: classical oil on canvas, visible brushstrokes, rich impasto texture, traditional lighting
transformation.transform_watercolor: fluid watercolor painting, soft pigment bleeds, translucent layering, paper grain visible
transformation.transform_charcoal_drawing: rough charcoal sketch, smudged textures, deep blacks and varied grey tones, expressive strokes
transformation.transform_cyberpunk_anime: 90s retro anime style, vibrant neon accents, sharp cel-shading, futuristic urban grit
transformation.transform_manga_screentone: black and white manga style, use of halftone dots for shading, sharp dynamic linework
transformation.transform_vector_illustration: flat vector art, clean geometric shapes, solid color blocks, modern graphic design style
transformation.transform_pop_art: Andy Warhol style pop art, bold saturated colors, high contrast, silkscreen print texture
transformation.transform_u-kiyo-e: traditional Japanese woodblock print style, flat perspective, bold outlines, organic pigments
transformation.transform_3d_render: modern 3D octane render, stylized character design, smooth surfaces, cinematic digital lighting
transformation.transform_concept_art: digital concept art, painterly but detailed, focus on mood and environment, professional studio look
transformation.transform_chalk_art: chalkboard drawing style, dusty texture, hand-written feel, high-contrast white on black
transformation.transform_pixel_art: high-fidelity pixel art, 32-bit style, vibrant limited palette, visible grid-based structure
transformation.transform_pixar_3d: modern 3D pixar animation style, high-end subsurface scattering on skin, expressive oversized eyes, soft rounded features, cinematic studio lighting
transformation.transform_classic_disney: hand-drawn 2D disney animation, elegant linework, expressive character acting, soft painted backgrounds, mid-20th century style
transformation.transform_rubber_hose_cartoon: 1930s vintage rubber hose cartoon style, black and white, pie-cut eyes, noodly limb movement, high-contrast ink style
transformation.transform_claymation: stop-motion clay style, visible thumbprints and texture, soft matte surfaces, slightly tactile and chunky character forms
transformation.transform_comic_book_modern: modern western comic art, bold dynamic inks, vibrant digital coloring, cinematic action-oriented framing
transformation.transform_arcane_painterly: stylized semi-realistic digital paint, heavy visible brushwork, high-contrast dramatic lighting, blend of 2D and 3D textures
transformation.transform_flat_minimalist_cartoon: modern 2D flat animation, no outlines, geometric simplification, vibrant solid color palettes, clean graphic look
transformation.transform_paper_craft: hand-cut paper style, visible layers and depth, textured cardstock, soft drop shadows between elements
transformation.transform_anime_90s: cel-shaded retro anime, hand-painted style, slight film grain, characteristic vibrant highlights on hair and eyes
transformation.transform_caricature: caricature style exaggerated features, emphasis on unique character traits, hand-rendered artistic distortion, high-personality portraiture
transformation.transform_synthwave: 80s retro-futurism synthwave style, vibrant purple and cyan palette, grid landscapes, glowing neon outlines, VHS scanline style
transformation.transform_low_poly: low poly geometric 3D style, visible triangular facets, stylized simplification, sharp edges, clean faceted lighting
transformation.transform_stained_glass: intricate glass mosaic style, leaded black outlines, translucent jewel-toned colors, back-lit illumination effect
transformation.transform_street_art_graffiti: urban spray paint style, bold drips, vibrant stencils, textured concrete background, raw and edgy
transformation.transform_renaissance_fresco: classical plaster mural look, muted pigments, soft aged textures, matte finish, traditional religious or mythic lighting
transformation.transform_video_game: modern video game style render, unreal engine style render
transformation.transform_grand_theft_auto_art: highly stylized digital illustration, bold black outlines, high-contrast cell shading, saturated cinematic colors

type.ltype_diffused_natural: diffused natural light, overcast or shade
type.ltype_golden_hour_natural: natural golden hour light, warm and directional
type.ltype_studio_softbox: studio softbox lighting, controlled and soft
type.ltype_studio_beauty_dish: studio beauty dish, focused flattering light
type.ltype_studio_ring_light: studio ring light, circular catchlights, even illumination
type.ltype_practical_lamp: practical lamp light source, warm interior
type.ltype_window_light: window light, soft side light from natural source indoors
type.ltype_neon: neon lighting, colorful artificial light, urban
type.ltype_mixed_light: mixed lighting, natural and artificial combined
type.ltype_overhead_household_led: standard domestic overhead LED light, even and flat interior illumination, neutral tone
type.ltype_fluorescent_tube: fluorescent tube lighting, cool-toned, slightly sterile quality, common in kitchens or older offices
type.ltype_dim_ambient_indoor: dim indoor lighting, low light level, deep natural shadows, authentic evening household atmosphere
type.ltype_tv_screen_glow: cool blue-toned glow from a television or monitor, soft directional light illuminating the face in a dark room
type.ltype_smartphone_screen_light: dim light from a handheld mobile device, close-range illumination, soft and localized
type.ltype_hallway_light_indirect: indirect light spilling from an adjacent room or doorway, soft and low-intensity, realistic depth
type.ltype_street_lamp_led: sharp neutral-white street lighting, high contrast, modern nocturnal urban environment
type.ltype_sodium_vapor_warm: traditional orange-yellow street lighting, deep shadows, nostalgic nocturnal city vibe
type.ltype_commercial_panel_led: standard bright commercial LED panels, neutral and clinical, common in modern retail or workplaces
type.ltype_nocturnal_low_light: extremely low light photography, realistic exposure for night scenes, preservation of natural dark tones
type.ltype_car_interior_glow: low-intensity light from a car dashboard and ambient interior LEDs, intimate and realistic
type.ltype_dappled_sunlight: natural sunlight filtered through trees or blinds, creating an organic pattern of light and shadow
type.ltype_single_bulb_pendant: harsh light from a single exposed ceiling bulb, strong downward shadows, raw domestic feel
type.ltype_night_stand_lamp: warm localized light from a bedside lamp, intimate and soft, heavy shadows in the rest of the room
type.ltype_kitchen_under_cabinet: warm directional light from under-cabinet fixtures, illuminating countertops and hands, sharp downward shadows
type.ltype_bathroom_vanity_mirror: bright frontal lighting from mirror-mounted bulbs, even facial illumination with minimal shadows, sharp catchlights
type.ltype_venetian_blind_shadows: natural sunlight filtered through horizontal blinds, creating distinct rhythmic bands of light and shadow across the subject
type.ltype_open_doorway_spill: directional light spilling from an open door into a darker room, creating a sharp vertical wedge of illumination
type.ltype_fridge_interior_glow: cool-toned, bright frontal light from an open refrigerator, high contrast against a dark kitchen environment
type.ltype_sheer_curtain_diffusion: bright daylight filtered through thin white curtains, soft and even but still directional, no harsh shadows
type.ltype_ceiling_fan_integrated_light: centralized overhead light from a ceiling fan fixture, flat and broad illumination, natural domestic vibe
type.ltype_garage_shop_light: cool-toned overhead industrial LED or fluorescent shop light, high clarity, raw and unpolished atmosphere
type.ltype_stairwell_pendant_drop: high-angle light from a hanging pendant bulb in a stairwell, creating long dramatic shadows on walls and steps
type.ltype_nightlight_floor_level: very low-intensity warm light from a wall-mounted nightlight near the floor, casting long soft shadows upward
type.ltype_monitor_desk_lamp_mix: cool blue light from a computer screen mixed with a warm desk lamp, creating realistic color temperature contrast on the face
type.ltype_sliding_glass_door_side_light: large-scale natural side-lighting from a patio or sliding door, broad and soft with realistic depth recession
type.ltype_dusk_interior_unlit: dim natural light entering a room at twilight with all interior lights off, cool blue-grey tones, flat and soft illumination
type.ltype_overcast_evening_ambient: low-intensity natural light from an overcast late afternoon, neutral and colorless, creates a realistic indoor gloom without harsh shadows
type.ltype_neutral_low_light_indoor: standard low-wattage neutral LED lighting, realistic shadow depth, captures the subject in an unpolished evening setting
type.ltype_distant_urban_ambient: neutral ambient light from nearby streetlights or city glow entering through windows, very low contrast, realistic nocturnal atmosphere
type.ltype_dim_corridor_spill: faint light spilling into a room from a distant hallway or doorway, neutral color temperature, subtle and non-dramatic
type.ltype_moonlit_indoor_soft: faint cool light from a full moon entering through a window, extremely low light, preserves natural skin texture with minimal highlights
type.ltype_cloudy_daylight_recession: natural light in a room far from any windows, dim and neutral, realistic fall-off in a domestic environment
type.ltype_neutral_night_ambient: the generic neutral light of a house at night with minimal secondary light sources, flat and honest, zero dramatic flair

subject_position.pos_right: subject positioned right of frame, left side open

subject_position.pos_lower: subject in lower portion of frame, space above

subject_position.pos_rule_thirds_right: subject on right third, rule of thirds composition
subject_position.pos_foreground: subject prominent in foreground, close to lens
subject_position.pos_background: subject receding into background, environmental space dominant

mm.lens_50mm: 50mm standard lens, natural field of view

aperture.fstop_f1_4: f/1.4, very shallow depth of field
aperture.fstop_f2_8: f/2.8, shallow to moderate depth of field

shutter_speed.shutter_very_slow: very slow shutter, strong motion blur, streaking

focus.focus_sharp_subject_blur_bg: subject in sharp focus, background blurred
focus.focus_sharp_throughout: sharp focus throughout, front to back
focus.focus_selective_focus: selective focus on specific part of subject
focus.focus_motion_blur: motion blur on subject or background

mood.mood_natural: natural, private moment captured, completely raw captured as it happens authentically

color_palette.palette_warm_neutrals: warm neutrals, cream, tan, warm grey
color_palette.palette_cool_neutrals: cool neutrals, white, cool grey, slate
color_palette.palette_earthy: earthy tones, brown, ochre, rust, olive
color_palette.palette_monochrome: monochrome, black and white, grey scale
color_palette.palette_warm_golden: warm golden tones, amber, gold, burnt orange
color_palette.palette_cool_blue: cool blue palette, muted blues and grey-blues
color_palette.palette_rich_saturated: rich saturated colors, deep and vibrant
color_palette.palette_dark_moody: dark moody palette, deep shadows, low saturation

grading_style.grade_natural: natural color grading, true to life
grading_style.grade_warm_grade: warm color grade, lifted shadows in amber
grading_style.grade_cool_grade: cool color grade, desaturated with blue shadows
grading_style.grade_film_grade: film emulation grade, slight fade, organic tones
grading_style.grade_high_contrast: high contrast grade, crushed blacks, bright highlights
grading_style.grade_vivid: vivid and saturated grade, punchy colors
grading_style.grade_matte: matte grade, flat blacks, compressed tonal range
grading_style.grade_split_tone: split toning, warm highlights and cool shadows
grading_style.grade_raw_digital_neutral: unprocessed digital color, zero post-production grading, neutral and flat color profile, true to sensor data
grading_style.grade_smartphone_auto_wb: mimics mobile phone auto-white balance, slightly punchy but realistic, clean and familiar digital rendering
grading_style.grade_unbalanced_ambient: unprotected color temperature, captures the raw tint of the environment (e.g., blue at dusk, green under fluorescent), honest and uncorrected
grading_style.grade_standard_jpeg_profile: standard factory 'out-of-the-box' digital camera profile, realistic contrast, no artistic color shifting
grading_style.grade_low_light_desaturation: natural desaturation occurring in low-light environments, realistic color fall-off in shadows, non-vivid and grounded
grading_style.grade_true_black_clipping: deep realistic blacks with no 'lifted' or 'faded' shadows, honest high-dynamic range without the artificial HDR flat look
grading_style.grade_clean_white_balance: perfectly neutral whites, no warm or cool bias, provides a clinical and sharp photographic truth
grading_style.grade_iso_noise_tint: subtle digital color noise in underexposed areas, realistic sensor behavior in low light, zero digital smoothing
grading_style.grade_recessed_interior_gloom: muted and neutral tones found in unlit indoor spaces, flat and unexciting color palette, highly realistic for candid home shots

narrative.narr_no_narrative: no specific narrative, abstract or aesthetic only
narrative.narr_candid_moment: candid private moment, subject unaware or absorbed
narrative.narr_anticipation: sense of anticipation, something about to happen
narrative.narr_aftermath: aftermath of an event, residual emotion
narrative.narr_confidence: narrative of personal confidence and strength

tension.tension_neutral: neutral tension, no strong emotional charge

resolution.res_low_res_intentional: intentional low resolution, grainy degraded look

realism_tags.real_unprocessed_cmos: raw CMOS sensor output, zero software sharpening, natural digital grain, authentic color response
realism_tags.real_non_hdr: realistic dynamic range, natural shadow clipping, no artificial detail recovery in dark areas, honest contrast
realism_tags.real_unfiltered_candid: straight-from-sensor aesthetic, no beautification filters, realistic skin imperfections and texture preserved
realism_tags.real_optical_clarity: sharpness derived from lens optics rather than digital edge enhancement, no sharpening halos
realism_tags.real_digital_honesty: no AI upscaling or denoising, preserves the raw characteristics of a high-ISO digital capture
realism_tags.real_snapshot_fidelity: looks like a high-quality personal snapshot, authentic white balance, realistic depth of field for small sensors
realism_tags.real_uncompressed_raw: maximum sensor data, no JPEG compression artifacts, clean and detailed without being artificially smoothed
realism_tags.real_zero_retouching: completely unedited, natural lighting faults preserved, honest representation of the subject and environment

detail_level.detail_extreme: extreme detail, pores, individual hairs, fabric threads
detail_level.detail_high: high detail, sharp and defined throughout
detail_level.detail_moderate: moderate detail, natural without extreme sharpness
detail_level.detail_soft_detail: soft detail level, painterly edge quality

post_processing.post_none: no visible post processing, straight out of camera look
post_processing.post_minimal: minimal retouching, natural skin and features preserved
post_processing.post_moderate: moderate retouching, clean but not artificial
post_processing.post_raw_unedited: raw unedited aesthetic, authentic and unprocessed

output_intent.intent_print_large: large format print quality, maximum detail
output_intent.intent_web_social: web and social media optimized, sharp at screen size
output_intent.intent_billboard: billboard scale quality, extreme detail and clarity
output_intent.intent_fine_art_print: fine art print quality, archival grade

action.action_standing_talking: standing mid-conversation, natural hand and face movement implied
action.action_sitting_relaxed: sitting in a relaxed position, body at ease
action.action_lying_resting: lying down resting, eyes closed or drowsy, body fully relaxed
action.action_lying_awake: lying down awake, eyes open, relaxed but alert
action.action_walking_casual: walking casually, mid-stride, natural arm swing
action.action_reading: reading, eyes focused downward, still and absorbed
action.action_applying_makeup: applying makeup, face slightly tilted, hand near face
action.action_dressing: in the act of dressing or adjusting clothing
action.action_looking_mirror: looking at self in mirror, evaluating or grooming
action.action_phone_use: using a phone, looking at screen, subtle downward gaze
action.action_leaning: leaning against a wall or surface, one leg crossed over the other, relaxed weight shift
action.action_crouching: crouching or kneeling on the ground, low center of gravity, compact body pose
action.action_adjusting_hair: hand in hair, fingers running through strands or pulling hair back, elbows raised
action.action_cooking: engaged in kitchen activity, hands busy with utensils, focused downward gaze at a counter
action.action_laughing_hysterically: doubled over with laughter, hands on knees or stomach, head thrown back, dynamic
action.action_working_laptop: sitting with laptop on lap or desk, hands on keyboard, screen light reflecting on face
action.action_taking_selfie: holding a phone at an angle, arm extended, looking into the phone camera lens
action.action_whispering: leaning in close to someone, hand cupped near mouth, secretive posture
action.action_climbing: climbing stairs or a ladder, one hand reaching up, body in an upward diagonal stretch
action.action_tying_shoes: bent over or sitting with one foot up, hands busy at the laces, rounded back
action.action_drinking_coffee: holding a mug with both hands, steam rising, looking thoughtfully over the rim
action.action_waiting: standing or sitting impatiently, checking a watch or tapping a foot, arms crossed
action.action_sleeping_upright: slumped in a chair or against a window, head tilted to the side, mouth slightly slack
action.action_celebrating: arms raised high in the air, chest open, energetic and triumphant stance
action.action_hugging_self: arms wrapped around own torso, shoulders slightly hunched, protective or cold posture
action.action_smoking: holding a cigarette or vape, exhaling a cloud of smoke, relaxed fingers near the lips
action.action_carrying_groceries: walking with bags in both hands, weight pulling the shoulders down, purposeful stride
action.action_fixing_tie_jewelry: hands at the neck or wrist, adjusting an accessory, eyes focused on the task
action.action_folding_laundry: standing at a table, hands smoothing out fabric, pile of clothes nearby, domestic focus
action.action_unlocking_door: standing at a doorway, hand reaching for a handle or inserting a key, body slightly angled
action.action_watering_plants: holding a watering can, leaning over indoor or garden plants, soft focused gaze
action.action_carrying_laundry_basket: walking while holding a plastic basket against the hip, weight shifted to one side
action.action_browsing_shelves: standing in a grocery aisle or library, one hand reaching for an item, eyes scanning upward
action.action_peeking_through_blinds: standing by a window, fingers parting the blinds or curtain, curious or watchful posture
action.action_dusting_surfaces: wiping a table or shelf with a cloth, hand in motion, slight bend at the waist
action.action_putting_on_shoes: sitting on the edge of a bed or chair, one foot lifted, leaning forward to pull on footwear
action.action_opening_fridge: standing before an open refrigerator, hand on the door, face illuminated by the internal light
action.action_sipping_soup: hunched slightly over a bowl, holding a spoon near the lips, steam rising toward the face
action.action_hanging_coat: reaching up toward a wall hook or coat rack, back slightly arched, arm extended
action.action_sweeping_floor: holding a broom handle with both hands, pushing debris, rhythmic body movement
action.action_checking_mailbox: standing outdoors by a letterbox, hands sorting through envelopes, casual outdoor attire
action.action_petting_animal: kneeling or leaning down, hand buried in fur, soft affectionate expression looking downward
action.action_scrolling_tablet: lounging on a sofa, tablet resting on lap, one finger hovering over the screen
action.action_tying_hair_up: both arms raised behind the head, elbows flared out, holding a hair tie, focused expression
action.action_washing_dishes: standing at a sink, hands submerged in soapy water, shoulders slightly hunched, steam in the air
action.action_waiting_for_kettle: leaning against a kitchen counter, arms crossed, staring blankly at a steaming kettle
action.action_waiting_crosswalk: standing at a curb, checking phone or looking at traffic, weight shifted to one leg, impatient posture
action.action_walking_dog_leash: holding a leash taut, body angled slightly forward or pulled back by the animal, outdoor setting
action.action_sitting_park_bench: sitting on a public bench, relaxed pose, looking at surroundings, hands resting in lap or on armrest
action.action_checking_map_phone: holding a phone or paper map with both hands, looking down with concentrated gaze, stopped on a sidewalk
action.action_shielding_eyes_sun: one hand raised to forehead to block sunlight, squinting slightly, looking upward toward the light source
action.action_adjusting_backpack: reaching back over shoulder to adjust straps or pulling bag forward, momentary pause in walking
action.action_holding_umbrella_rain: one arm raised holding an open umbrella handle, standing or walking, wet environment implied
action.action_taking_landscape_photo: holding phone or camera horizontally with both hands at eye level, arms extended, focused on screen
action.action_window_shopping_browsing: standing outside a storefront, leaning slightly toward the glass, hands behind back or in pockets, curious gaze
action.action_hailing_taxi: standing near a street edge, one arm raised high in the air, leaning slightly out toward traffic
action.action_bending_straight_legs: bending over at the waist with straight legs to pick something up, emphasizing the posterior curve and hamstring stretch
action.action_kneeling_looking_low: kneeling on both knees looking down fixedly at a low object or floor, submissive posture, hands on thighs or near ground
action.action_straddling_chair_backward: sitting on a chair facing the backrest, legs spread wide around the seat, arms resting on the top of the chair back
action.action_leaning_over_counter_arched: leaning heavily forward over a kitchen island or tall table, elbows on the surface, back significantly arched
action.action_lying_knees_up_open: lying flat on back on the floor or bed, knees bent upwards and allowed to fall open to the sides, relaxed supine pose
action.action_reaching_high_shelf_stretch: standing on tiptoes reaching both arms as high as possible up a shelf, emphasizing an arched back and lifted chest
action.action_crawling_looking_under: on hands and knees on the floor, head lowered near the ground looking under furniture, posterior raised high
action.action_deep_squat_browsing: low deep squat to look at items on a bottom shelf, heels down, knees wide apart, hands on knees
action.action_yoga_cobra_stretch: lying on stomach pushing torso up with arms, exaggerated back arch, pelvis on the ground, head tilted back
action.action_lying_stomach_looking_back: lying prone on stomach on a bed or sofa, propped slightly on elbows, twisting torso and head to look back over one shoulder
action.action_lying_prone_propped: lying on stomach, propped up on elbows, head raised, back arched, feet often kicked up playfully behind
action.action_lying_prone_flat: lying completely flat on stomach, head turned to one side, arms resting by the head or tucked under the chest, fully relaxed
action.action_lying_prone_reaching: lying on stomach, one arm reaching forward to grab an object while propped on the other elbow, torso slightly twisted
action.action_lying_prone_sunbathing: lying face down on a flat surface, arms stretched out or hands under forehead, legs straight, eyes closed in a peaceful state
action.action_side_lying_browsing: lying on side, propped on one elbow, looking at a phone or book, upper leg slightly bent and shifted forward
action.action_side_lying_dozing: lying on side in a relaxed fetal position, eyes closed, hands tucked under the cheek, natural curve of the spine
action.action_side_lying_reaching: lying on side, one arm reaching toward the camera or a nearby object, causing a subtle twist in the torso and hips
action.pose_side_lying_s_curve: side-lying position with the bottom leg straight and the top leg pulled up toward the chest, emphasizing the waist-to-hip transition
action.pose_side_lying_stacked: lying on side with legs neatly stacked and slightly bent at the knees, showcasing the silhouette of the outer hip and thigh
action.pose_side_lying_propped_back: lying on side but leaning slightly back onto the shoulder blades, chest open, creating a long line from the underarm to the ankle

common_pose.pose_leaning_wall: leaning against a wall, casual relaxed
common_pose.pose_contrapposto: standing with weight shifted to one hip, one knee slightly bent, natural shoulder tilt
common_pose.pose_seated_cross_legged: sitting on a chair or floor with legs crossed at the knees or ankles
common_pose.pose_seated_one_knee_up: seated on floor or bed, one leg tucked in, the other knee pulled up toward the chest
common_pose.pose_perched_edge: sitting on the very edge of a table or bed, feet dangling or just touching the floor
common_pose.pose_slumped_relaxed: seated or leaning with a completely relaxed spine, shoulders dropped, informal posture
common_pose.pose_back_to_camera: standing or sitting facing away, looking back over one shoulder at the lens
common_pose.pose_arms_overhead: standing or lying with both arms raised above the head, stretching the torso
common_pose.pose_hands_on_hips: standing with hands firmly on hips, elbows flared out, assertive and broad stance
common_pose.pose_side_profile_standing: standing perpendicular to the camera, showcasing the body's side silhouette
common_pose.pose_tucked_ball: lying on side or seated, knees pulled tightly to the chest, arms wrapped around legs
common_pose.pose_leaning_back_elbows: lying or seated leaning back on elbows, chest opened, neck slightly extended
common_pose.pose_straddling_reverse: sitting backward on a chair or stool, legs spread, chest against the backrest
common_pose.pose_one_arm_raised: standing or reclining with one arm behind the head, elbow pointed upward
common_pose.pose_walking_away: captured from behind while walking away, head turned slightly to capture the profile
common_pose.pose_squatting_heels_up: crouching on the balls of the feet, heels lifted, balanced and alert
common_pose.pose_legs_up_wall: lying on back with legs extended vertically against a wall or headboard
common_pose.pose_prone_twist: lying on stomach but with the lower body twisted so one hip is raised
common_pose.pose_reclining_chaise: semi-seated reclining position, one arm supporting the head, legs elegantly draped
common_pose.pose_shuffling_forward: mid-stride walking toward the camera, eyes fixed forward, dynamic movement
common_pose.pose_fetal_position: lying on side, curled up tightly, head tucked toward knees, protective and soft
common_pose.pose_arched_prone: prone position with a deep lumbar arch, weight on elbows, chest lifted, creating a sharp curve from neck to hips
common_pose.pose_elevated_posterior: all-fours position with the chest lowered toward the surface and the hips raised, creating a steep diagonal line
common_pose.pose_wide_kneeling: kneeling with knees spread wide apart, torso upright or slightly leaning back, hands resting on the outer thighs
common_pose.pose_asymmetric_side_lie: lying on side with the hips tilted toward the camera, the top leg crossed over and resting on the surface in front of the bottom leg
common_pose.pose_supine_spread: lying on back, arms stretched wide, legs bent at the knees and angled outward, creating an open and relaxed body frame
common_pose.pose_bent_over_profile: standing in profile, bent 90 degrees at the waist, legs locked straight, emphasizing the silhouette of the lower body
common_pose.pose_twisted_seated: seated on a chair or floor, legs facing one direction while the torso is twisted 45 degrees toward the lens
common_pose.pose_deep_crouch_open: low squat with weight on the balls of the feet, knees pushed wide, heels touching or close together, centered posture
common_pose.pose_reclining_v_shape: lying on back with the lower body slightly elevated on a pillow or cushion, legs slightly parted and relaxed
common_pose.pose_wall_press: standing facing a wall, hands pressed high against the surface, back arched, head tilted back toward the camera
common_pose.pose_table_edge_lean: perched on the edge of a high table or counter, legs dangling or one foot hooked on a stool, torso leaning back on hands
common_pose.pose_one_leg_on_furniture: standing with one foot flat on the ground and the other leg hoisted up onto a chair or bed, creating a wide-angle hip stretch
common_pose.pose_doorway_frame_lean: standing in a doorway with hands pressing against the sides of the frame, weight leaning forward, back arched away from the camera
common_pose.pose_seated_sideways_chair: sitting sideways on a chair with legs draped over one armrest, torso twisted toward the backrest, showing the side profile and back
common_pose.pose_staircase_recline: lying back across several steps of a staircase, head lower than the hips, legs angled upward, creating a dramatic diagonal body line

weight_distribution.weight_even: weight evenly distributed on both feet, balanced
weight_distribution.weight_shifted_left: weight shifted to left leg, right hip relaxed
weight_distribution.weight_shifted_right: weight shifted to right leg, left hip relaxed
weight_distribution.weight_forward: weight forward, slight lean toward camera

body_tension.tension_tense: tense body, muscles engaged, heightened state

type.type_slim: slim build, lean frame, low body fat
type.type_athletic: athletic build, toned muscles, fit physique
type.type_curvy: curvy figure, pronounced curves, full silhouette
type.type_petite: petite frame, small stature, delicate proportions
type.type_tall_lean: tall and lean, long limbs, elongated proportions
type.type_full_figured: full figured, soft curves, generous proportions
type.type_muscular: muscular build, defined musculature, strong frame
type.type_hourglass: hourglass figure, defined waist, balanced bust and hips

flanks.flanks_natural: very subtle body fat on flanks, average torso width

hips.hips_angular: angular hip structure, prominent hip bones

muscle_definition.muscle_none: no visible muscle definition, soft appearance
muscle_definition.muscle_defined: well defined muscles, athletic and sculpted
muscle_definition.muscle_very_defined: very defined musculature, strong athletic build

hands.hands_slender: slender petite hands, slim delicate fingers
hands.hands_natural: natural unmanicured petite hands, delicate fingers

tone.tone_fair: fair skin, light complexion, cool undertones
tone.tone_light_medium: light medium skin tone, neutral undertones
tone.tone_medium_tan: medium tan skin, warm golden undertones
tone.tone_olive: olive skin tone, warm green undertones
tone.tone_deep_brown: deep brown skin, dark rich complexion
tone.tone_ebony: ebony skin, very deep dark complexion

texture.texture_photorealistic: photorealistic skin texture, visible pores, natural imperfections
texture.texture_natural: natural skin texture, realistic without heavy retouching
texture.texture_freckled: light freckles across nose and cheeks
texture.texture_dewy: dewy skin, healthy glow, slight shine
texture.texture_matte: matte skin, no shine, flat finish
texture.texture_aged_natural: natural aging texture, fine lines, authentic appearance

details.detail_light_freckles: light freckles scattered across face and shoulders
details.detail_heavy_freckles: heavy freckles, dense scatter across face
details.detail_tan_lines: tan lines visible, bikini or clothing outline

style.hairstyle_medium_straight: medium length straight hair, shoulder length
style.hairstyle_updo_bun: hair pulled up in a bun

color.haircolor_highlighted: highlighted hair, lighter tones through base color
color.haircolor_balayage: balayage, natural gradient from dark roots to lighter ends
color.haircolor_ombre: ombre, distinct gradient from dark to light

temple.temple_full_temple: full hairline at temples, no recession
temple.temple_soft_temple: soft natural hairline at temples, slight feathering
temple.temple_widows_peak: widow's peak, distinct V-shape at center hairline
temple.temple_receding_temples: slightly receding at temples, mature hairline
temple.temple_shaved_temples: shaved or very short hair at temples
temple.temple_swept_back_temples: hair swept back at temples, clean and open

apex.apex_flat_crown: flat crown, minimal volume at apex
apex.apex_high_crown: high crown, volume lifted at apex
apex.apex_cowlick: cowlick at crown, natural directional growth
apex.apex_voluminous_apex: voluminous at crown, full rounded apex
apex.apex_thinning_crown: slight thinning at crown, reduced density
apex.apex_tight_at_apex: hair lying tight and flat at crown

structure.face_heart: heart shaped face, wide forehead, narrow chin
structure.face_diamond: diamond face shape, high cheekbones, narrow jaw
structure.face_angular: angular facial structure, sharp defined edges

temple_width.temple_narrow_temples: narrow temple width, face tapers sharply from forehead
temple_width.temple_average_temples: average temple width, balanced upper face
temple_width.temple_wide_temples: wide temples, broad upper face structure

cheeks.cheeks_slight_indent: slight fat loss on cheeks volume

eyes.eyes_almond: almond shaped eyes, classic balanced shape
eyes.eyes_round: round eyes, wide and open appearance
eyes.eyes_downturned: downturned eyes, outer corners angled downward
eyes.eyes_wide_set: wide-set eyes, broad spacing between eyes
eyes.eyes_close_set: close-set eyes, narrow spacing between eyes

nose.nose_snub: snub nose, short and slightly upturned

lips.lips_average: average lip volume, balanced upper and lower
lips.lips_cupids_bow: pronounced cupid's bow, defined upper lip shape
lips.lips_full_lower: full lower lip, more volume on bottom
lips.lips_pouty: naturally pouty lips, heavy and full

eyebrows.brows_natural_full: natural full eyebrows, ungroomed but shaped
eyebrows.brows_feathered: feathered brows, soft individual hair strokes visible
eyebrows.brows_sharp_defined: sharp defined brows, clean precise edges

expression.expr_neutral: neutral expression, muscles fully relaxed, lips softly closed, eyes at rest with natural lid weight
expression.expr_subtle_smile: subtle closed-mouth smile, slight upward pull at lip corners, relaxed cheeks, soft warm eyes
expression.expr_full_smile: full open smile, teeth visible, cheeks lifted and full, eyes naturally narrowed with crow's feet
expression.expr_serious: serious expression, brow neutral or slightly set, lips pressed together, direct unblinking gaze
expression.expr_pouty: pouty expression, lower lip slightly pushed forward, eyes soft and heavy-lidded, slightly sullen
expression.expr_smirk: one-sided smirk, asymmetric lip pull on one side, knowing confident look, one brow slightly raised
expression.expr_laughing: laughing, mouth open, eyes crinkled shut or nearly shut, head may tilt back, completely natural
expression.expr_surprised: surprised, brows raised and arched, eyes wide open, mouth slightly parted, genuine reaction
expression.expr_dreamy: dreamy, eyes slightly unfocused or at middle distance, lips softly parted, relaxed and distant
expression.expr_intense: intense, brow slightly furrowed, eyes narrowed and focused, jaw set, strong direct gaze
expression.expr_seductive: seductive, heavy-lidded eyes, slight parting of lips, relaxed jaw, slow deliberate gaze at camera
expression.expr_pensive: pensive, eyes cast slightly down or to side, brow lightly furrowed, lips neutral, inward focus
expression.expr_defiant: defiant, chin slightly raised, jaw set, eyes direct and unwavering, lips pressed or slightly curled
expression.expr_vulnerable: vulnerable, eyes soft and slightly glassy, brow gently raised at center, lips slightly parted
expression.expr_candid_laugh: caught mid-laugh, unposed, eyes may be closing, mouth open naturally, completely unstaged
expression.expr_shy: shy expression, slight downward gaze, small suppressed smile, body language slightly inward
expression.expr_confident: confident expression, relaxed brow, steady gaze, slight natural set to the lips
expression.expr_skeptical: skeptical, one eyebrow raised higher than the other, lips slightly pursed to one side, narrow squinting gaze
expression.expr_mischievous: mischievous, eyes bright and narrowed, wide playful grin, eyebrows arched in a 'V' shape
expression.expr_smug: smug, chin slightly raised, closed-mouth asymmetric smirk, heavy-lidded eyes showing quiet satisfaction
expression.expr_disgusted: disgusted, nose wrinkled upward, upper lip curled, eyes narrowed with a slight downward pull of the brows
expression.expr_enraged: enraged, furrowed brow pulled low, nostrils flared, teeth bared or jaw tightly clenched, intense piercing glare
expression.expr_terrified: terrified, eyes wide with visible whites around the irises, brows high and pulled together, mouth agape
expression.expr_bored: bored, heavy drooping eyelids, jaw slightly slack, eyes looking slightly away or glazed over, featureless relaxation
expression.expr_winking: winking, one eye tightly shut in a wink, the other eye bright and wide, cheek lifted on the winking side, playful half-smile
expression.expr_melancholy: melancholy, eyes cast downward, corners of the mouth slightly drooping, brow soft and heavy with sadness
expression.expr_awed: awed, eyes wide and sparkling, mouth parted in a soft 'O' shape, eyebrows raised in wonder, face fully illuminated
expression.expr_determined: determined, jaw firmly set, eyebrows lowered and focused, lips pressed into a thin line, unwavering forward gaze
expression.expr_contemptuous: contemptuous, head tilted back slightly, eyes looking down the nose, one side of the upper lip pulled into a sneer
expression.expr_playful: playful, tip of the tongue slightly visible between teeth or biting the lower lip, eyes crinkled and energetic
expression.expr_exhausted: exhausted, heavy drooping lids, slight dark circles under eyes, mouth slightly open as if catching breath, slack facial muscles
expression.expr_stoic: stoic, perfectly centered features, no visible muscle tension, eyes direct but devoid of emotional projection, flat lip line
expression.expr_sad: sad, corners of the mouth turned down, inner brows raised and drawn together, heavy drooping eyelids, subtle lip quiver
expression.expr_shocked: shocked, jaw dropped open, eyes wide with visible sclera, eyebrows arched high, nostrils slightly flared
expression.expr_crying: crying, eyes watery and red-rimmed, tears tracking down cheeks, squinted eyes, trembling lower lip, flushed skin
expression.expr_grieving: grieving, intense brow furrow, mouth open in a silent wail, eyes tightly shut, deep lines of distress around the nose and mouth
expression.expr_anxious: anxious, lower lip caught between teeth, darting eyes, tension in the forehead, slight sheen of sweat on the brow
expression.expr_relieved: relieved, eyes closed or looking upward, soft exhale through parted lips, all facial tension visibly draining away
expression.expr_pained: pained, eyes squinted shut, jaw tightly clenched, brow heavily furrowed, lines of tension radiating from the eyes
expression.expr_flirty: flirty, head tilted down with eyes looking up, one biting the lower lip, playful sparkle in the eyes, slight blush
expression.expr_disoriented: disoriented, eyes unfocused or hazy, mouth slightly slack, brows knit in confusion, head tilted as if off-balance
expression.expr_sleepy: sleepy, eyelids half-closed and heavy, jaw relaxed, slight drooping of the features, looking dazed or near sleep
expression.expr_lustful: lustful, heavy-lidded 'bedroom' eyes, biting the lower lip, intense and focused gaze
expression.expr_ecstatic: ecstatic, eyes rolled back slightly, mouth open and gasping, neck muscles strained, head tilted back in pure bliss
expression.expr_climax: orgasmic, eyes tightly shut or rolled upward, brow furrowed in a pleasure-pain mix, mouth agape, nostrils flared
expression.expr_eye_roll: eyes rolled upward, tongue slightly out or biting lip, exaggerated expression of overstimulation or sass
expression.expr_duck_face: duck face, lips pursed and pushed forward, cheeks sucked in slightly, eyes wide or squinted in a baddie look
expression.expr_tongue_out: playful, tongue sticking out to the side or front, eyes bright and wide, joyful and unposed vibe
expression.expr_squinch: the squinch, tightening the lower eyelids while keeping the upper lids relaxed, slight smirk, high-fashion model look
expression.expr_wink_kiss: blowing a kiss, one eye winking, lips pursed in a kissing motion, one cheek lifted, playful and flirtatious
expression.expr_peace_face: peace face, squinted eyes, wide toothy grin, tongue often pressed against the back of teeth, energetic
expression.expr_genuine_kiss: imaginary genuine kiss, eyes slightly wrinkled, lips pursed in kissing motion, cheeks slightly lifted, playful and flirtatious
expression.expr_drunken_daze: dazed and blissful, eyelids heavy and uneven, mouth softly parted, unfocused upward gaze, relaxed facial muscles
